hero.titlePart2: expeditions across Brazil and the world.
hero.subtitle: Exclusive experiences for those who seek freedom, nature and real adventure. Small groups, Mangalarga Marchador horses, hand-picked lodging.

marcas.title: Three paths. One essence.
marcas.subtitle: Each brand within Energias da Terra exists for a specific way of living the ride. Find yours.

manifesto.title: It's not a tour. It's an inner crossing.
manifesto.body: We design every expedition as a film: script, rhythm, cinematography. Hand-picked trails, soulful lodging, gastronomy that speaks to the land. Each spot is limited to preserve the silence, and the depth, of what we offer.

inclui.title: Everything taken care of. You just arrive and ride.

passos.title: Booking your spot is simple and direct.

historias.title: Stories from those who crossed with us.
historias.intro: Real accounts from riders who crossed mountains, rivers and silences with us.

faq.title: So you ride with peace of mind.

ctaFinal.title: The mountains are waiting for you.

footer.tagline: Immersive horseback expeditions across Brazil and the world. Small groups, local guides, careful lodging, an ancient way of paying attention to the world.
